query: INSERT INTO idSequences (projectId, entityType, prefix, currentNumber, minNumber, maxNumber, padLength) VALUES (1, 'Task Group', 'TG-', 0, 1, 9999, 4), (1, 'Issue Group', 'IG-', 0, 1, 9999, 4) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE entityType = entityType;
